Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Janakiraman G. Author, maintainer.

  • Serge Zaitsev. Copyright holder.
    Author of webview library (src/webview/webview.h)

  • Niels Lohmann. Copyright holder.
    Author of nlohmann/json (inst/include/nlohmann/json.hpp)

  • Microsoft Corporation. Copyright holder.
    WebView2 SDK (src/webview2_sdk/)

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

G J (2026). RDesk: Native Desktop App Framework for 'R'. R package version 1.0.4, https://github.com/Janakiraman-311/RDesk.
